meta.description: Employment Tribunal decisions tagged with Equality Act 2010 jurisdiction codes, with PDF-parsed outcome and award data where available.

cases.case_name: Mrs A Brookes v Black Pearl Offshore Ltd: 6014438/2024
cases.key_principle: Direct age discrimination claim succeeded; claimant entitled to compensation for financial losses and injury to feelings.

cases.case_name: Mrs H L Gurney v C Fletcher T/a Sunrise Cleaning Services: 3304769/2025
cases.respondent: C Fletcher T/a Sunrise Cleaning Services
cases.key_principle: Respondent liable for unauthorized wage deductions, wrongful dismissal, and unpaid holiday entitlement.

cases.case_name: Ms M Ariano v Cutting Edge Podiatry Ltd: 3309115/2024
cases.key_principle: Claim dismissed for non-attendance where claimant fails to pursue case and ignores case management orders.

cases.case_name: Mr J Makwana v Transport UK London Bus Ltd: 3305163/2024
cases.key_principle: Claimant's unfair dismissal complaint was not well-founded and dismissed.

cases.case_name: Mr H Kadima v Watford General Hospital: 6019993/2024
cases.key_principle: Factual disputes between parties must be resolved at final hearing, not by strike-out application.

cases.case_name: A Santos v Kudos Mobility Group: 6025697/2025
cases.key_principle: Claim struck out for non-compliance with tribunal orders and failure to actively pursue the case.

cases.case_name: Mr J Spence v The BSS Group Ltd and Travis Perkins plc: 6001807/2025
cases.respondent: The BSS Group Ltd and Travis Perkins plc
cases.key_principle: Claimant's claim dismissed for non-attendance where claimant failed to engage and comply with tribunal orders.

cases.case_name: Ms S Ehioze v Elysium Healthcare Ltd: 6006291/2025
cases.key_principle: Claims presented outside statutory time limits cannot proceed unless reasonable practicability or just and equitable extension applies.

cases.case_name: M Naylor v Airsoft Cymru The Depot Ltd: 1604167/2025
cases.key_principle: Employers must pay unlawful wage deductions, notice pay, and accrued holiday entitlements upon termination.

cases.case_name: Mr L Thompson v Cepac Ltd and Page Outsourcing UK Ltd: 6010960/2024
cases.respondent: Cepac Ltd and Page Outsourcing UK Ltd
cases.key_principle: Claims struck out where claimant's conduct is unreasonable, scandalous and vexatious.

cases.case_name: Mrs C Sansum v Secretaty of State for Justice: 2501299/2024
cases.key_principle: Claims dismissed for non-attendance where claimant failed to communicate or comply with tribunal orders.

cases.case_name: Mr M Colasurdo v Besamalsore UK Ltd T/a Topolino: 6045094/2025
cases.key_principle: Employer must pay accrued holiday pay under Working Time Regulations 1998 based on gross weekly wages and full period of employment.

cases.case_name: J North v Surrey County Council: 6004790/2024
cases.key_principle: Claims may be struck out under Rule 38 when claimants fail to comply with tribunal orders and do not actively pursue their claims.

cases.case_name: Mr R Kaseram v Oxleas NHS Foundation Trust: 2305663/2023
cases.key_principle: Unauthorised wage deductions must be repaid to the employee.

cases.case_name: S Simina v Ann Summers Ltd: 6041801/2025
cases.key_principle: Unfair dismissal claims require two years' service; claim struck out for lacking jurisdiction.

cases.case_name: Miss L Dear v House on the Hill: 6032675/2025
cases.key_principle: Claims not actively pursued may be struck out under Rule 38 without further hearing.

cases.case_name: Ms A Kozlowska v Zotefoams plc: 6020985/2024
cases.key_principle: Strike out is draconian and only appropriate in clear cut cases with disputed facts rare.

cases.case_name: Mr S Brown v The Chief Constable of Sussex: 2305555/2024
cases.key_principle: Previous judgment revoked; jurisdiction issue to be determined at future hearing.

cases.case_name: Ms S Jonin v Travel Nexus Ltd: 6044164/2025
cases.key_principle: Employer liable for unpaid wages, notice pay, completion bonus, and holiday pay.

cases.case_name: Miss A Randhawa v British Airways plc: 2305071/2024
cases.key_principle: Employer's failure to make reasonable adjustments claim dismissed where applicant applied for apprenticeship role.

cases.case_name: Ms D Wellington v Greensleeves Homes Trust (T/a Greensleeves Care): 2302758/2024
cases.key_principle: Claim struck out for lack of active pursuit and non-cooperation with procedural requirements.

cases.case_name: Mr I Wroe v Barchester Health Care Ltd: 6004086/2024
cases.key_principle: Employer failed to reasonably adjust work rostering and workload; harassment and victimisation occurred via disability remarks and NMC referral threat.

cases.case_name: Ms Buxton v Financial Conduct Authority: 6001809/2026
cases.key_principle: Application for interim relief under section 128 Employment Rights Act 1996 was dismissed.

cases.case_name: Dr N Mahmood v Barking, Havering and Redbridge University Hospitals NHS Trust: 6004525/2026
cases.respondent: Barking, Havering and Redbridge University Hospitals NHS Trust
cases.key_principle: Interim relief application for automatic unfair dismissal claim refused.

cases.case_name: S Crann v Trust Alliance Group Ltd: 6009065/2025
cases.key_principle: Claim struck out under Rule 38 for failure to actively pursue proceedings.

cases.case_name: Mr J Aird v Bilfinger UK Ltd: 6010929/2024
cases.key_principle: Strike out application refused; claim allowed to proceed.

cases.case_name: Mr S Akanbi v Supreme Guarding Services Ltd: 3201161/2024
cases.key_principle: Claimant's complaints of direct race discrimination and victimisation were dismissed as not well-founded.

cases.case_name: Ms S Moyo v Cecil Home Care Services Ltd: 3200517/2024
cases.key_principle: Dismissal by reason of childbirth constitutes automatic unfair dismissal under ERA 1996 s.99.

cases.case_name: Ms T Namayanja v Proritas Healthcare Professionals Ltd: 6003623/2024
cases.key_principle: Religion discrimination and harassment claims dismissed; breach of contract and unauthorised wage deductions upheld.

cases.case_name: T Blandford v Spiritualist National Union T/a The Arthur Findlay College: 6030762/2025
cases.respondent: Spiritualist National Union T/a The Arthur Findlay College
cases.key_principle: Claimant was unfairly dismissed and entitled to basic and compensatory awards.

cases.case_name: Mr J Bonnsain v Barclays Bank UK plc: 2412198/2023
cases.key_principle: Claims for failure to make reasonable adjustments dismissed where claimant withdrew or failed to establish liability.

cases.case_name: Miss S J Venables v Bridgwater Community Healthcare NHS Foundation Trust: 2407869/2023 and 2410886/2023
cases.respondent: Bridgwater Community Healthcare NHS Foundation Trust: 2407869/2023 and
cases.key_principle: Failure to provide usable larger screen constituted breach of reasonable adjustments duty.

cases.case_name: Mr O Olasehinde v M Group Energy Metering Ltd: 3200419/2024
cases.key_principle: Capability dismissal for long-term ill-health following proper process does not constitute unlawful discrimination.

cases.case_name: Mr S Wright v EF Bakers Ltd: 6034935/2025
cases.key_principle: Claimant lacked sufficient length of service for tribunal to hear unfair dismissal claim.

cases.case_name: Mr Y H A Tan v Allerton C&S SW Ltd: 6015669/2024
cases.key_principle: Back injury from July 2024 satisfied disability definition; head injury did not.

cases.case_name: Mr O Belding v Michael Clift and Sons Garden Service Ltd: 1401673/2025
cases.respondent: Michael Clift and Sons Garden Service Ltd
cases.key_principle: Breach of contract damages, redundancy payment and unpaid holiday entitlement are recoverable in employment tribunal.

cases.case_name: Miss E Kolaniak v Nice Systems UK Ltd: 6007192/2025
cases.judge: Employment Judge Mr J S Burns
cases.key_principle: Redundancy dismissal unfair where consultation inadequate and grievance ignored.

cases.case_name: A Marmont v Kinetic Games Ltd: 6031254/2025
cases.key_principle: Claimant must have two years service to bring unfair dismissal complaint under ERA 1996.

cases.case_name: Mr S Burton v Nelipak Elsham Ltd: 6038744/2025
cases.key_principle: Claimant failed to establish constructive unfair dismissal or unlawful deductions from pay claims.

cases.case_name: Miss E Gresley v SRCL Ltd: 2302753/2023
cases.key_principle: Claimant's discrimination and unfair dismissal claims dismissed; employer accepted reasonable adjustments were made.

cases.case_name: Ms A Thompson v No5 Beauty and Aesthetics Ltd and Others: 2302606/2024
cases.respondent: No5 Beauty and Aesthetics Ltd and Others
cases.key_principle: Refusal to pay maternity pay and implement pay increase constitutes pregnancy discrimination.

cases.case_name: Mr A Naumov v FIL Investment Management Ltd: 6031763/2025
cases.key_principle: Interim relief refused where dismissal relates to conduct rather than protected disclosure.

cases.case_name: Mr P Lindley v Diamond Bus (North West) Ltd: 6003895/2024
cases.key_principle: Applying Bradford factor score to disability-related absences without proper disability consideration constitutes discrimination.

cases.case_name: J Ogundolani v Viewpoint Housing Association Ltd: 4106855/2024
cases.key_principle: Claims out of time lack jurisdiction; claimant failed to establish it was not reasonably practicable to submit claim in time.

cases.case_name: Mr M Imms and Mr R Latham v A One Distribution (UK) Ltd: 2407352/2023 and 2407361/2023
cases.claimant: Mr M Imms and Mr R Latham
cases.key_principle: Constructive unfair dismissal established through fundamental breaches of implied trust and confidence.

cases.case_name: Miss A Squelch v Mizzling Ltd: 6006960/2024
cases.key_principle: Respondent's response struck out for failure to comply with tribunal orders and provide required information.

cases.case_name: Miss N Johnson v Bletchley and Fenny Stratford Town Hall: 3302387/2025
cases.respondent: Bletchley and Fenny Stratford Town Hall
cases.key_principle: Unfair dismissal claim struck out where claimant lacks two years' continuous employment.

cases.case_name: Miss F Begum v Kier Ltd and Kier Group plc: 3309200/2024 and 2402875/2024
cases.respondent: Kier Ltd and Kier Group plc: 3309200/2024 and
cases.key_principle: Claimant unlikely to succeed on automatic unfair dismissal for protected disclosure where dismissal reason was pre-existing performance concerns.

cases.case_name: Mrs K Lester v The Chief Constable of Greater Manchester Police: 2413003/2023
cases.respondent: The Chief Constable of Greater Manchester Police
cases.key_principle: Time limit extension for harassment claims may be granted as just and equitable under section 123(b) Equality Act 2010.

cases.case_name: HJS Generation Ltd v Commissioners for Revenue and Customs: 3305402/2023
cases.key_principle: Appeal concerning National Minimum Wage Notice of Underpayment adjourned pending respondent's explanation for non-compliance.
